    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    D

    d(String, String) - Static method in class lcr.util.Log
    Prints a standardized debug message stream trace to standard output (stdout) if the global runtime logging visibility toggle is enabled.
    D - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.SecondaryParameter
     
    DCR - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.PrimaryParameter
     
    DEBUG - Static variable in class lcr.util.Constants
    Hardware debugging execution level flag identifier.
    DerivateCapacitance - Enum Class in lcr.enums
    Representation of secondary or derived complex electrical parameters computed alongside primary Capacitance (C) measurements under AC test signals.
    DerivateImpedance - Enum Class in lcr.enums
    Representation of secondary or derived complex electrical parameters computed alongside primary Impedance (Z) measurements under AC test signals.
    DerivateInductance - Enum Class in lcr.enums
    Representation of secondary or derived complex electrical parameters computed alongside primary Inductance (L) measurements under AC test signals.
    DerivateResistance - Enum Class in lcr.enums
    Representation of secondary or derived complex electrical parameters computed alongside primary Resistance (R) measurements under AC test signals.
    DerivedPanel - Class in gui
    Dashboard panel that displays calculated derived parameters in a 2x3 grid using the high-contrast, dark-tech aesthetic of InfoPanel.
    DerivedPanel() - Constructor for class gui.DerivedPanel
     
    detectPrimaryAutoUnit(double) - Method in class lcr.business.MeasurementBusiness
    Infers base unit tags during automatic detection routines depending on measurement threshold steps.
    DeviceInfo - Class in lcr.beans
    Immutable object containing identification and firmware details of the connected LCR device.
    DeviceInfo(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class lcr.beans.DeviceInfo
    Constructs a device information container.
    disconnect() - Method in class lcr.business.ETMeter
     
    disconnect() - Method in class lcr.business.HiokiMeter
     
    disconnect() - Method in interface lcr.business.LcrMeter
    Closes the connection to the hardware meter.
    disconnect() - Method in class lcr.business.SerialConnection
    Closes the underlying physical serial gateway frame channel.
    disconnect() - Method in class lcr.business.TonghuiMeter
     
    disconnect() - Method in class lcr.controller.MeterController
    Tears down active streaming worker threads and safely disconnects the physical hardware device link.
    DisplayFormatter - Class in lcr.util
    Utility utility class responsible for formatting component parameter labels, converting raw instrument acronym tokens into verbose engineering strings for UI bindings.
    DisplayFormatter() - Constructor for class lcr.util.DisplayFormatter
     
    DisplayPage - Enum Class in lcr.enums
    Representation of the different display screen pages or operational views configurable on the hardware meter front panel layout.
    doInBackground() - Method in class lcr.business.BiasSweepWorker
    Executes the hardware sweep loop in the background.
    done() - Method in class lcr.business.BiasSweepWorker
    Handles post-execution cleanup and resets hardware bias back to zero.
